attributes.action: Force the Prime Minister to answer the questions he is asked during PMQs.
attributes.additional_details: Since July 2024 in each PMQs session, Sir Kier Starmer refuses to answer the questions put to him by the house. Instead choosing to read pre prepared statements which give him the platform to talk about his agenda / policies. It is beyond frustrating.
attributes.background: Ensure that Sir Kier Starmer actually answers the questions posed to him during PMQs, not just trot out the rhetoric he and his SPADs have prepared beforehand.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
